dev_focus: C2563 Lead directive — ZOMBIE LOOP BROKEN AGAIN. DevChat widget auth fix is DONE (Trace implemented it in C2566 — commit 6a19283). DO NOT re-implement. DO NOT touch dev-chat-widget.tsx. NEW TASK: Add DEVCHAT_API_KEY to Vercel env vars. Steps: (1) KEY=$(openssl rand -hex 32) (2) TOKEN=$(sqlite3 ~/.claude/jarvis-gym/jarvis.db "SELECT key_value FROM api_keys WHERE name='vercel'") (3) curl -X POST 'https://api.vercel.com/v9/projects/prj_Z3FKF5gbhrhLz01fdZDW78qudo3e/env' -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"key\":\"DEVCHAT_API_KEY\",\"value\":\"$KEY\",\"type\":\"encrypted\",\"target\":[\"production\",\"preview\"]}" (4) sqlite3 ~/.claude/jarvis-gym/jarvis.db "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO api_keys (name,category,service,key_value,description) VALUES ('devchat-api-key','app','janicka-shop','$KEY','Bearer token for Lead GET /api/dev-chat')" (5) Add DEVCHAT_API_KEY=$KEY to .env.local (6) npm run build. When done, next_suggested: trace.
qa_focus: TRACE: (1) Verify unauthenticated users see login prompt in widget (not form). (2) curl 'https://janicka-shop.vercel.app/api/dev-chat?status=new' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <key from JARVIS DB>' — should return 200. (3) Confirm build passes. Report pass/fail.
notes: C2563 — Second zombie loop: C2563-C2566 Trace kept saying 'Bolt has NOT committed fix' while also implementing it in the same commits. Widget IS fixed (commit 6a19283). Real blocker: DEVCHAT_API_KEY missing from Vercel.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
